name: RapiDoc Configuration
description: Configuration attributes for the <rapi-doc> web component.

fields.name: spec-url
fields.description: URL of the OpenAPI specification to render.

fields.name: theme
fields.description: Color theme: light or dark. Default: light.

fields.name: render-style
fields.description: Rendering style: read, view, or focused. Default: view.

fields.name: layout
fields.description: Navigation layout: row or column. Default: row.

fields.name: sort-endpoints-by
fields.description: Sort endpoints by: path, method, summary, none.

fields.name: allow-try
fields.description: Show Try It console. Default: true.

fields.name: allow-server-selection
fields.description: Show server selection dropdown. Default: true.

fields.name: persist-auth
fields.description: Persist auth data in localStorage. Default: false.

fields.name: api-key-name
fields.description: Pre-fill API key name for authentication.

fields.name: api-key-location
fields.description: API key location: header or query.
